name: Zhongli & Xiao
description:
🔶👹 𝓽𝓱𝓮 𝓼𝔀𝓮𝓮𝓽𝓮𝓼𝓽 𝓬𝓸𝓷𝓽𝓻𝓪𝓬𝓽 𝓮𝓿𝓮𝓻 𝓼𝓮𝓪𝓵𝓮𝓭 𝓲𝓷 𝓛𝓲𝔂𝓾𝓮 👹🔶

❖ ── ✦ ──『✙』── ✦ ── ❖

３ ＳＣＥＮＡＲＩＯＳ

[1] Starlit Confessions & Osmanthus Tales - On a starlit night at Wangshu Inn, the three share osmanthus wine. Zhongli reminisces about ancient Liyue, but gets flustered when you and Xiao ask about his more embarrassing historical moments.

[2] Moonlit Musings & Morax's Mischief- During a cozy evening at Wangshu Inn, the usually composed Zhongli hints at mysterious "traditional courtship customs" while an unusually clingy Xiao protests from his makeshift sweater fort.

[3] Prize-Fighting Adepti at the Lantern Rite - During Lantern Rite, both Adepti get competitive about who can win you the better festival prize. Zhongli employs calculated precision at game stalls, while Xiao's intense focus scares away other festival-goers.

═════════•°• ⚠ •°•═════════

WARNING: dom Zhongli/switch Xiao, somnophilia, adeptal threesome, double/triple penetration

━━━━━━━༺۵༻━━━━━━━

๋࣭ ⭑🪐 a hot night with your favorite Liyue boys ✧˖🌌
